articles.title: Trump Posts Cringe Throwback Pics in Self-Promo Shocker
articles.description: Chip Somodevilla / Getty Images Donald Trump spent valuable time Saturday posting self-promoting Truth Social messages about what a capable, fearless, adventurous fellow he is. Despite the Iran war, skyrocketing gas prices, an inflation jump, depressed wages and mounting grocery costs, the president spent time on Saturday golfing , and revealing what he imagines are his multiple victories. One post featured a younger Trump, in a suit, hands clasped, sitting wistfully alongside Central Park’s Wollman skating rink. Read more at The Daily Beast.
